description: Style Note Look sporty over the weekend with this rugged look polo t-shirt from indian terrain. The athletic colour is a classic and will never go out of style. Wear this luxurious soft piece with everything from denims to neutral shorts to create the perfect casual aura Product DetailsMaroon polo t-shirt that has a spread ribbed collar, rugged half buttoned placket, short sleeves with tipped, ribbed cuffs, embroidered branding on the left chest and a vented hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Dry flat in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height:6' and shoulders:18") is wearing a size M
